overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through Night City at dusk. The player moves from a neon-lit covered walkway under an overpass, past futuristic storefronts and construction barriers, emerging onto an open city street with traffic and holographic advertisements, finally looking up at towering mega-skyscrapers against a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway, passing metal construction barriers and neon storefronts on either side

entered.detail: yellow and black striped metal barriers lining the left side of the walkway
futuristic convenience store with bright cyan neon signage reading '25h/7'
large illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the left wall displaying various products
dark concrete overhead structure with exposed beams and lighting fixtures
tall palm tree growing from a planter box on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban walkway beneath a massive overpass. Metal construction barriers line the left side while a neon-lit convenience store glows on the right. The player walks forward through the sheltered corridor, passing scattered pedestrians and illuminated digital billboards under the shadow of the concrete ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor exiting covered walkway toward open street

events.description: exits the covered overpass into a more open urban area with visible sky ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the exit of the covered walkway, moving toward the open street with increasing pedestrian traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward camera, passing by on the left side

entered.detail: futuristic glass and metal bus shelter with illuminated 'TECH' signage
large glowing orange holographic koi fish swimming in the air above the distant overpass

segments.scene_description: As the player approaches the end of the covered walkway, the scene opens up to reveal a bus stop shelter on the left and a massive holographic koi fish swimming in the distance. The lighting shifts from neon-dominated to a mix of artificial and natural dusk light. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions as the environment transitions from enclosed to open.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with elevated highway and holographic advertisements

events.description: futuristic vehicles drive past on the multi-lane street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk next to moving traffic, approaching the intersection with towering skyscrapers visible ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic teal sedan driving past on the street, followed by other vehicles

entered.detail: multi-level highway overpass with glowing pink and cyan light strips on the barriers
massive glass and steel towers rising into the sky, including the distinctive Arasaka Tower
stream of futuristic cars and taxis moving along the road adjacent to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player emerges fully into the open city street, with the elevated highway glowing with neon lights directly ahead. Futuristic vehicles stream past on the left while pedestrians walk along the sidewalk. The massive holographic koi fish swims above the highway, and the iconic skyscrapers of Night City dominate the skyline against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with mega skyscrapers towering overhead

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the massive skyscrapers and holographic fish against the blue sky

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to gaze at the massive skyscrapers and holographic fish advertisement swimming overhead

entered.detail: small flying car or drone visible in the sky between the towers

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts dramatically upward to reveal the sheer scale of Night City's architecture. The mega-skyscrapers tower overhead against a bright blue sky, catching the last light of dusk. The holographic koi fish swims out of frame as the view focuses on the vertical expanse of glass and steel facades, with a small flying vehicle visible in the distance between the towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered, neon-lit urban corridor into the vast, open expanse of a futuristic metropolis at dusk. It begins within a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing metal construction barriers and a glowing convenience store under the shadow of the ceiling. As the player approaches the exit, the environment opens up to reveal a bus stop and a massive holographic koi fish, while the lighting shifts from artificial neon to a blend of natural dusk light. The scene then expands fully into the open city street, where futuristic vehicles stream past and the holographic fish swims above a glowing elevated highway. Finally, the camera tilts dramatically upward, leaving the street behind to reveal the sheer vertical scale of glass and steel mega-skyscrapers towering against a bright blue sky.
